name: Smoked Salmon Rolls
recipeIngredient: 2 Large thin slices of Pumpernickle bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove crusts from pumpernickle bread.
2. Spread 1/2 tsp of smoked-salmon cream cheese onto each slice.
3. Sprinkle finely chopped green onion over the cream cheese.
4. Starting at the long side, tightly roll up one slice into a log.
5. Wrap the remaining slice around the first roll, matching seams.
6. Cover the rolls snugly with plastic wrap.
7. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or overnight.
8. Slice into 1/2-inch rounds. Each roll makes 8 pieces.
